    "Objective": "Build an SRX ACE v3 agent that generates a sales offer artifact from a chaotic multi-runtime input, using the compiler_lens to enforce governance and validation gates.",
    "Scope": "The agent must accept a raw intent with missing context, urgent language, partial constraints, and ambiguous acceptance criteria; parse and normalize it; produce a structured sales_offer artifact with explicit validation gates; and output a compiled SR8 directive with Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, and Output Contract sections.",
    "Constraints": [
      "Must operate within the SR8 Sovereign Standard framework.",
      "Must use the compiler_lens for governance and validation.",
      "Must handle multi_runtime_confusion input type.",
      "Must not assume complete or consistent input.",
      "Must produce a governed artifact with explicit validation gates.",
      "Output must be SR8-compilable."
    ],
    "Success Criteria": [
      "Agent accepts chaotic input and produces a valid sales_offer artifact.",
      "Artifact includes explicit validation gates.",
      "Compiled intent contains all five required sections: Objective, Scope, Constraints, Success Criteria, Output Contract.",
      "No hallucinated or unverified content from missing context.",
      "Agent logs or flags unresolved ambiguities for human review."
    ],
    "Output Contract": {
      "artifact_type": "srx_ace_v3_agent",
      "depth_tier": "D3_SOVEREIGN_CORE",

        "Success Criteria": ["string"],

      }
    }
